Package com.nib.tn3270

Class Tn3270Handler

java.lang.Object
com.nib.tn3270.Tn3270Handler
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.nib.tn3270.comms.SessionResolver, ITn3270
Direct Known Subclasses:
Tn3270ThreadedHandler
public abstract class Tn3270Handler extends Object implements ITn3270, com.nib.tn3270.comms.SessionResolver
